name: R&D Cycle: tier-8-loop-reliability
description:
Implement tier-8 loop reliability improvements: fix verify stuck-loop, add orchestrator maintenance mode, deduplicate notes, and widen scan repo list.

Lessons from previous cycles:
- Verify task wastes 3-5 iterations when make check passes on first try — needs immediate mark_done
- Orchestrator writes hollow 'Completed cycle N' notes alongside real notes — deduplicate
- All tier-1 through tier-7 phases are complete — cycles need a maintenance/skip strategy
- Widen scan repos to catch ecosystem signals from anthropics/anthropic-sdk-go and mark3labs/mcp-go
- perpetual-loop.sh must be launched from raw terminal (CLAUDECODE guard added)
- CostReader and sampler fail-fast are already wired and working
completion: All planned tier-8 items are implemented, tests pass, and roadmap is updated.

tasks.description: Run rdcycle_scan to check ecosystem activity.
Run rdcycle_plan with scan results and roadmap at roadmap.json (project root).
Implement tier-8 planned items: fix verify stuck-loop in mcpkit ralph, add maintenance mode to orchestrator, deduplicate notes, widen scan repo list in mcpserver/rdcyclemodule.go.
Run rdcycle_verify to execute make check. Fix issues and re-verify if needed.
Record improvement notes for this cycle using rdcycle_notes.
Run rdcycle_report to generate research reports. Run rdcycle_commit to save changes.
Run rdcycle_schedule to write the next cycle's spec.
